steps.assistant_text: Conditional 2-call wrapper: if (*a1==9) { gl_func(a0,a1); } gl_func(a0,a1); — using a NAMED local 'int v = *a1;' (vs inline '*a1 == 9') forces IDO to use $v0 for the temp instead of $t6, matching the target's lw/bne register allocation.

metadata.verification: Verified via objdiff report (fuzzy_match_percent=100.0). Promoted from 99.375% NM-wrap to exact via named-local trick.
